title: ARCHETYPE_EXHAUSTION_2026-05-07: All spec-driven engines tested; operator actions needed to unlock next direction
content: As of 2026-05-07, all available spec-driven engine archetypes have been tested on available instruments/timeframes. None have produced a SIGNIFICANT_EDGE candidate that passes V11 gates. Summary: (1) DCB2 (Donchian breakout): ETH 1h INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE (2 sweeps, CI_lower max=0.863); ETH 4h DEMOTED by portfolio gate (VBO corr=0.70); BTC 1h NO_EDGE. Archetype blocked by structural VBO correlation. (2) BBR (MeanReversion Oscillator): BTC 1h NO_EDGE (PF=0.13-0.23) even after archetype fix; ETH 1h had infra issues before fix. (3) TPB (TrendPullback): BTC 1h/4h degenerate (frequency starvation from cross-timeframe bias filter + schema parameter mismatch). ETH not tested but same structural issues apply. (4) MMR (Momentum Mean Reversion): ETH 1h NO_EDGE (multiple tests including extended hold); ETH 4h NO_EDGE (worse than 1h); BTC 1h DISCARDED 2026-05-01. (5) CMR: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE (4 cells), n too low. Remaining potentially testable combinations require operator action. Continuing loop with BBR ETH 1h as least-recently-tested non-broken archetype (though prognosis is poor based on BTC result).

data_wishlist.item: TPB schema fix: change 'tpR' to 'tp1R' and 'pullbackAtrTolerance' to 'pullbackTouchAtr' in trend_pullback.schema.json
data_wishlist.impact: Enables actual parameter sweeping on TPB (currently all sweeps run at engine defaults due to schema mismatch)
data_wishlist.blocker: schema is in blackheart/ (operator edit authority)

data_wishlist.item: TPB requireBiasTimeframe=false option: add boolean schema parameter to disable cross-timeframe 4h bias filter
data_wishlist.impact: Removes frequency starvation on TPB 1h; enables testing ETH 1h pullbacks without 4h bias constraint
data_wishlist.blocker: TrendPullbackEngine.java is in blackheart/ (operator edit authority)

data_wishlist.item: DCB2 BTC 4h account_strategy creation by operator (POST /api/v1/account-strategies on research JVM)
data_wishlist.impact: Enables testing DCB2 on BTC 4h; BTC dynamics may show lower VBO correlation than ETH
data_wishlist.risk: still likely VBO-correlated but BTC-ETH correlation may be different

data_wishlist.item: MMR SHORT direction: add SELL signal when price > EMA200 + extremeAtrMult*ATR AND RSI > overboughtThreshold
data_wishlist.impact: MMR LONG is dead but SHORT direction (fade overbought extremes above EMA200) may show edge
data_wishlist.blocker: MomentumMeanReversionEngine.java is in blackheart/ (operator edit authority)

data_wishlist.item: Funding rate strategy: use V34-V37 funding_rate_history table for mean-reversion of funding rate extremes
data_wishlist.impact: Completely new archetype uncorrelated with price-action-only strategies
data_wishlist.data_status: V34-V37 backfill needed (tpb_not_seeded.md notes this is blocked)

structured_data.next_action: Try BBR ETH 1h (least-recently-tested non-broken archetype) while operator considers priority-1 and 2 fixes
